The problem, in numbers

Every minute on hold and every call missed after hours is a customer deciding whether to wait or to call someone else.

0%+
of callers hang up after 2 minutes on hold
Source: Calabrio call-center research
0–0%
of inbound calls arrive after standard business hours
Source: PCN, 2026 Missed Call Revenue Study (industry estimate)
0%
of callers will not call back after one unanswered attempt. They call a competitor instead
Source: BIA/Kelsey research
~0%
average call abandonment rate across industries
Source: SQM Group benchmark, corroborated by Talkdesk 2021 Global Contact Center KPI Benchmarking Report

Figures are general industry benchmarks. Actual performance for your business is sized during pilot.

How it works

ORCA takes a call from first ring to clean handoff in three steps.

01

A caller dials in

Your phone system routes inbound calls to ORCA. The caller is greeted within seconds, with no hold music and no queue.

02

ORCA collects everything

A structured two-minute intake captures the details your team needs: contact information, the reason for the call, and a preferred time or location. Built-in gates route any call that needs a human straight to one.

03

Your team follows up

Your team receives a complete intake file and calls the customer back. There is no rework and no missing information.

✦

Always an escape hatch. The caller can press 0 at any point to reach a live agent, with all collected information passed through automatically.

Missed-revenue estimator · illustrative

≈ $918,000 per year

Estimator only. Every output is calculated from the numbers you set above, with the single stated assumption. No ORCA pricing is included; pricing is scoped per deployment.

Stated assumption: This estimate assumes a missed caller does not call back, which is consistent with research showing 85% of callers do not retry after one unanswered attempt (BIA/Kelsey).

Why now

Built around your business.
Not the other way around.

ORCA is not an off-the-shelf bot. Every deployment is shaped to your intake script, your phone system, and the way your team actually works. You get a solution built to your exact business needs, live in weeks.

Without ORCA
  • –Agents spend 5 to 7 minutes of handle time on every routine intake call
  • –Repetitive intake work drives low satisfaction and high turnover
  • –Hold times spike past an hour during seasonal call surges
  • –Lead loss to abandonment is real but unmeasured at most businesses
  • –Hiring for this role is a constant headache
  • –Call data lives in agent notebooks, never structured and never analyzed
With ORCA
  • +A structured two-minute AI intake runs around the clock
  • +Agents are freed for higher-value work
  • +Capacity scales with call volume, so there is no overflow queue
  • +Every call is captured as clean structured data from minute one
  • +There is no turnover on a role nobody wants
  • +Pricing is usage-based, so you pay for handled calls rather than headcount
The hidden upside
Every call becomes structured data.

Today, intake details live in agent shorthand and sticky notes. ORCA captures each call as clean, structured fields: caller intent, key details, location preference, and source. It is ready for your CRM, your practice-management system, or your operations dashboards.

That data drives concrete decisions. You can see which sources convert, which marketing channels send the best leads, which days need more staff, and where you are losing leads before they ever reach your team.

We do not quote a dollar figure per record for this, because anyone who does is guessing. It is worth what your operations team gets out of it, and we surface it in your dashboard from day one.

FAQ

Common questions.

Most callers prefer a clear two-minute AI intake to a fifteen-minute hold. ORCA is concise, conversational, and always offers a human escape by pressing 0. Anyone who wants a person gets one, with their information already collected so they are not asked to repeat themselves.

Your team reviews every intake before the callback, and flagged or incomplete intakes are clearly marked. The AI is also built with strict logic gates: if it is unsure, it transfers to a human.

Yes, a caller can always reach a person. Pressing 0 at any point transfers them immediately, with any collected information passed to the agent.

Initial deployment typically takes a few weeks, depending on integration complexity with your phone system and back-office tools. We build to your exact workflow.

We integrate with most major phone and interactive voice response (IVR) systems. Contact us to confirm yours.

All data is encrypted in transit and at rest, stored on Canadian infrastructure (Azure), and handled in compliance with the Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA). We never sell or share caller data.
